name: git_diff
description: Show git changes summary including status, diff, and log, or checkout/reset modified files.

parameters.name: --checkout=FILE
parameters.description: Reset a modified file via git checkout --

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces multiple git status/diff/log calls with one, saving 2+ steps per check; --checkout eliminates separate git checkout -- FILE step and --checkout-backup prevents data loss by auto-backing up before reset.
